summary: Verified UI changes: Dashboard share block (code + link, copy interactions, toasts) and Landing howto-step-0 copy. All checks passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Both the code text button and the icon button trigger the same copyCode handler; that's fine but consider stopPropagation to avoid double-fire if wrapper handlers are added later.
Displayed link strips protocol for readability (good UX); clipboard writes full URL — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing step 0 renders exact new copy with ShieldCheck icon and '01' numbering. Dashboard cards show share-block with room-code (uppercase monospace) and room-link (host-stripped display), both rows copyable via text or icon, toasts 'Room code copied' / 'Invite link copied' verified. Enter room button navigates to /watch/<room_id>. Clipboard interception confirmed writeText called with raw room_id for code, full https URL for link.
